task: Build a structured ingestion pipeline for markdown API documentation

subtasks.description: Parse markdown documents into normalized sections
lessons: Preserve headings, code blocks, auth hints, and endpoint metadata before chunking.

subtasks.description: Chunk normalized content for coding-agent retrieval
lessons: Attach section metadata to chunks so downstream search can explain results.
Small fixture-based checks catch parser regressions earlier than manual inspection.
Incremental ingestion needs both content hashes and pipeline versioning.

task: Debug a failing pull request check and patch the test failure

lessons: Start from the failed job log before changing code.
Use the narrowest failing test command first.
CI traces are reusable when they preserve exact failing commands and error summaries.

task: Build a usable frontend tool with responsive controls

subtasks.description: Design compact controls for repeated workflows
lessons: Use icon buttons and stable dimensions for dense tool surfaces.

subtasks.description: Verify layout across desktop and mobile
lessons: Screenshots revealed text overflow that code review alone missed.
Frontend traces should include viewport sizes and visible layout risks.
